fortressOfTheMuslim.title: حصن المسلم من أذكار الكتاب والسنة
fortressOfTheMuslim.author: د.سعيد بن وهف القحطاني
fortressOfTheMuslim.note: Comprehensive Azkar book by Dr. Sa'id bin Wahf al-Qahtani. Only app-supported languages included: ar, id, ms

tuhfatAlAkhbar.author: الشيخ عبدالعزيز بن باز
tuhfatAlAkhbar.note: Azkar and supplications book by Sheikh Abdul Aziz bin Baz. Currently only available in Arabic.
